case_title: CAVALRY SPV II, LLC VS. SERGIO V PENA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV II, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CONSECO FINANCE CORP.
